summary: Backend-only testing for LevelUp completed successfully. All 10 pytest cases passed against the public preview URL (https://xp-missions-4.preview.emergentagent.com). Covered system endpoints (/api/health, /api/ready, /api/config), premium gating (402 premium_required) on both AI endpoints, image validation (400 for non-image and empty file), real AI Food Scan call with a synthetically generated JPEG containing food-like visual features (burger + fries plate, sesame seeds, multiple colors/edges/shadows) returning a valid NutritionEstimate schema, and AI Plan generation with bodyweight-only safety validator + full-gym scenario. Plan source was correctly 'ai' or 'fallback' with non-empty days and no forbidden barbell/machine/cable/smith/leg-press tokens for bodyweight equipment.

minor.issue: AI (GPT-4o) frequently returns Exercise.rest as an integer (e.g., 60, 90) instead of a string like '60s'/'90s'. Pydantic WorkoutPlan rejects this, so the validator returns None and the endpoint silently falls back to the deterministic plan (source='fallback'). End user still gets a valid plan, but the AI-generated path is hit less often than ideal. Suggest coercing rest/reps to str in _validate_plan_payload before constructing WorkoutPlan, or instructing the model more strictly that 'rest' must be a quoted string.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py: AI Food Scan endpoint does not currently store the image — good (matches privacy disclaimer). Consider rate limiting/abuse protection before production.
server.py uses @app.on_event('shutdown') which is deprecated in FastAPI in favor of lifespan handlers. Non-blocking, but worth migrating.
Expo package mismatches in expo logs (expo@54.0.34 vs expected ~54.0.35, expo-font, expo-router). Not blocking backend tests but flagged for frontend stability when the frontend phase is added.
seed_data_creation: No DB seed data created. AI Food Scan uses an in-memory generated JPEG (Pillow) with real visual features per /app/image_testing.md.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env (not EXPO_BACKEND_URL). Pro entitlement is simulated via header x-app-user-id: pro. AI endpoints (analyze-image, plans/generate) call GPT-4o through emergentintegrations; AI responses can take 5-20s — keep timeouts >=30s. Plan endpoint will always return 200 (it falls back deterministically on AI failure). Food Scan can return 502 if AI is unreachable, but in this run it returned a valid NutritionEstimate (calories: integer, confidence: float, disclaimer exact match). Bodyweight equipment uses canonical token 'Bodyweight only' (lowercased to match validator).
